title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a multimodal local AI model for agentic workflows on consumer laptops with 16GB VRAM. It features encoder-free unified architecture for text, vision, and audio, plus multi-token prediction drafters for reduced latency. The model integrates with Ollama, LiteRT-LM, AI Edge Gallery, and tools like Hermes and Continue through OpenAI-compatible endpoints.
